all.en: I never thought I would care about points from a convenience store.
all.zh: 我從來沒想過自己會在乎便利商店的點數。

all.en: However, my best friend kept telling me that I was missing out on great deals.
all.zh: 不過，我最好的朋友一直跟我說，我錯過了許多超划算的優惠。

all.en: One Saturday morning, I downloaded the 7-Eleven app and created an account.
all.zh: 某個週六早上，我下載了7-Eleven的應用程式並註冊帳號。

all.en: It took less than five minutes and asked only for very basic information.
all.zh: 註冊不到五分鐘，只要求填寫非常基本的資料。

all.en: At the counter, I scanned the app's barcode whenever I paid for anything.
all.zh: 在櫃台結帳時，無論買什麼，我都會掃描應用程式上的條碼。

all.en: Within two weeks, I had earned enough points for a free hot coffee.
all.zh: 短短兩週內，我就累積到足夠的點數，可以兌換一杯免費熱咖啡。

all.en: The app also offered surprising daily discounts on snacks and lunch boxes.
all.zh: 應用程式還提供零食和便當每日意想不到的折扣。

all.en: My favorite feature was the limited-time stamp campaign for small figurines.
all.zh: 我最喜歡的功能是限時的集點活動，可以換小公仔。

all.en: I quickly became one of those people who chase plastic toys with passion.
all.zh: 我很快就變成那種熱衷收集塑膠玩具的人。

all.en: My friend laughed, saying she had created a monster with the app.
all.zh: 我朋友笑著說，她用這個應用程式創造了一個怪物。

all.en: Still, saving a few dollars every week somehow felt strangely rewarding.
all.zh: 但每週能省下幾塊錢，不知為何就是讓我覺得特別有成就感。

all.en: By the end of the month, my desk drawer was full of small figurines.
all.zh: 到了月底，我的書桌抽屜裡塞滿了小公仔。

all.en: My friend visited and counted twenty-three different characters lined up in a row.
all.zh: 朋友來訪時，數出整整二十三個不同的角色排成一列。

all.en: She suggested I open a glass display case to show them off properly.
all.zh: 她建議我買一個玻璃展示櫃，好好地把它們展示出來。

all.en: I found a small wooden cabinet online and assembled it the next weekend.
all.zh: 我在網路上找到一個小木櫃，下個週末把它組裝起來。

all.en: The figurines fit perfectly across three shelves with room left for more.
all.zh: 公仔在三層架上擺得剛剛好，還留有空間可以再放更多。

all.en: My mother visited and asked if I planned to collect them my whole life.
all.zh: 媽媽來訪時，問我是不是打算收藏一輩子。

all.en: I laughed and said only until the campaigns finally stopped releasing new ones.
all.zh: 我笑著說，只到活動不再推出新款為止。

all.en: The app even started suggesting personalized lunch boxes based on my purchases.
all.zh: 應用程式甚至開始根據我的消費，推薦個人化的便當組合。

all.en: It was clearly tracking my habits, but I honestly did not mind at all.
all.zh: 它顯然在追蹤我的習慣，但老實說我一點也不介意。

all.en: That tiny barcode had quietly become part of my everyday Taiwanese routine.
all.zh: 那個小小的條碼，悄悄地融入了我每日的台灣生活。

all.en: By the end of the year, my figurine collection had swelled to over fifty pieces.
all.zh: 到了年底，我的公仔收藏已經增加到超過五十隻。

all.en: My mother suggested I sell duplicates online to make some extra cash.
all.zh: 媽媽建議我把重複的賣到網路上，賺點外快。

all.en: I posted a few photos on a local collectors' forum that very evening.
all.zh: 我當天晚上就在一個本地收藏家論壇上，貼了幾張照片。

all.en: Within hours, several buyers messaged me asking about the rarer characters.
all.zh: 幾個小時內，就有好幾個買家私訊我詢問比較稀有的角色。

all.en: I sold seven duplicates and instantly earned back half my coffee budget.
all.zh: 我賣掉了七隻重複的，馬上把咖啡預算賺回了一半。

all.en: One buyer offered to trade me a limited figurine I had been chasing.
all.zh: 有一位買家提議和我交換一隻我一直在追的限量公仔。

all.en: We met at a busy 7-Eleven near the train station the following Friday.
all.zh: 我們下個週五在火車站附近一間熱鬧的7-Eleven見面。

all.en: He turned out to be a friendly graphic designer with similar collecting habits.
all.zh: 原來他是位友善的平面設計師，收藏習慣和我很像。

all.en: We exchanged contact information and planned to swap duplicates every month.
all.zh: 我們交換了聯絡方式，計劃每個月固定交換重複的公仔。

all.en: A simple loyalty app, I realized, had quietly built me an entire new community.
all.zh: 我體會到，一個小小的會員應用程式，悄悄地為我建立了一個全新的社群。
